title: lepidium divaricatum subsp. trifurcum
intro: Lepidium divaricatum subsp. trifurcum, also known as cressleaf groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lepidium divaricatum subsp. trifurcum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
